data_source: yfinance (Yahoo Finance public HTTP endpoints, no key)
idea_provenance: live web research (lit-scout): Man Group, Research Affiliates, Xu 2024 SSRN 4778937, Moskowitz-Ooi-Pedersen 2012

strategies.reason: robust low-turnover vol-targeting overlay; matches SPY Sharpe with -14pp drawdown (beats SPY +0.09 Sharpe and -24pp DD with crises in-sample); cost-robust to 40bps; OOS decay 0.02; smooth 25-cell parameter plateau; look-ahead-clean

current_recommendation: ~76% SPY / ~24% cash per live vol target (risk-managed allocation, not investment advice)
summary: Real web-research cycle. Top lit-scout seed (vol-targeting) implemented and PASSED: same Sharpe as SPY but -14pp drawdown (-24pp and +0.09 Sharpe edge with crises in-sample), negligible cost, robust plateau, OOS-stable. First validated strategy.
next_cycle_seeds: modest leverage cap 1.5x to test Sharpe beat in calm regimes
defensive cross-asset dual-momentum SPY/QQQ vs TLT/GLD/cash
wire FRED T-bill yield for the cash leg
infra_changes: StrategySpec.gross_leverage=None to support variable-exposure market-timing strategies; runner threads it through the validation battery
